brief: Write a paragraph about why the best ideas come when you're not trying
sample: The best ideas came when you walked. Or when you were in the shower. Or when you were looking at the water. You did not sit at the desk and wait for them. That was no good. You could sit there all day and nothing would come and you would feel bad. But then you would go out and walk by the river and you would not think about the problem and the idea would be there. It was always there. You just had to stop looking for it. You had to do something else. You had to let your mind go quiet. And then it would come. It was like fishing. You put the line in and you did not watch it. You looked at the hills and the trees and you felt the sun. And then there was the pull. The idea came when you were not trying. That was the way it worked and it was the only way it worked.
